name: Strawberry Sauce (Smith)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the apple juice into a blender.
2. Add half of the sliced strawberries to the blender.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. Transfer the mixture to a saucepan.
5. Stir in the cornstarch until well mixed.
6. Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly.
7. Continue cooking until it thickens.
8. Add the remaining strawberries and stir until heated through.
9. Serve warm.
